name: signed_attribute_constant
description: Code should include signed attribute constants using the 's prefix in RTLIL attribute definitions with base-based notation (e.g., 32's00000000000000000000000000000100). Unsigned attributes (e.g., 32'00000000000000000000000000000100) should be distinguishable from signed ones of equal numeric value.

name: unsigned_attribute_constant
description: Code should include unsigned attribute constants without 's prefix in RTLIL attribute definitions with base-based notation (e.g., 32'00000000000000000000000000000100). Unsigned attributes should be distinguishable from signed ones of equal numeric value.

name: short_signed_attribute_constant
description: Code should include signed attribute constants with short bit widths (e.g., 5's00100). Short-width signed constants should be preserved distinctly from unsigned equivalents during RTLIL serialization round-trips.

name: short_unsigned_attribute_constant
description: Code should include unsigned attribute constants with short bit widths (e.g., 5'00100). Short-width unsigned constants should be preserved distinctly from signed equivalents during RTLIL serialization round-trips.
